idea.title: Spark Shield
idea.hook: Sparks rush your core from every direction — spin your shield to catch each one before it hits. One miss and the core blows.
idea.hook_ru: Искры мчатся к ядру со всех сторон — вращай щит, чтобы поймать каждую до удара. Один промах — и ядро взрывается.
idea.prototype: A core sits at screen center with a curved shield orbiting it. Hazard sparks fly inward from the screen edges at varying angles. Rotate the shield (full-screen-half hold zones) to intercept each incoming spark on its arc. Block = score + combo; a spark reaching the unguarded core = game over (1-hit). Difficulty escalates: faster + more frequent spawns, then multi-color sparks requiring a matching shield segment from wave 4. Endless arcade with wave milestones; meta = score-unlocked core skins persisted in localStorage.
idea.why_novel: block/rotate verb vs dodge verb; same proven arcade-reflex family but a fundamentally different action — you actively intercept hazards with a controllable barrier instead of moving a body out of the way. Adds a color-match depth layer and rotation-aim skill ceiling Daily Dodge does not have.
idea.non_timer_pressure: 1-hit lives (one core) + physically encroaching enemies (sparks converging on the core) + escalating spawn rate & speed per wave + later color-match resource constraint. No countdown timer anywhere.
idea.lose_condition: gs='GAMEOVER' when lives <= 0; lives starts at 1, so the first spark that reaches the core (its distance to center <= CORE_RADIUS) ends the run. Reachable from random play in ~15-40s.

sources.title: Daily Dodge 73.8s/play arcade winner
sources.snippet: arcade genre top retention 74.1s/play; build more arcade reflex; mobile controls must improve (Daily Dodge's one complaint: 'mobile controls are not the best')

synthesizer_brief: Extend the arcade-reflex winning family with a fresh BLOCK mechanic; fix the mobile-control complaint with full-screen-half touch zones; add wave/meta depth.

comment_theme_requirements.mobile_controls_excellent: Full left/right screen-half hold zones — nothing tiny, reachable with one thumb in portrait. Continuous rotation while held; multi-touch aware; desktop arrows/A-D mirror.
comment_theme_requirements.clear_goal_in_5s: First GRACE_SECONDS (10s) spawn slow single-color sparks from one side only, so the player immediately learns 'rotate to block'. On-screen tutorial on MENU + reopenable ? panel.
comment_theme_requirements.real_depth: Endless waves with speed/spawn ramp, combo scoring, color-match phase from wave 4, and score-unlocked core skins persisted in localStorage.

alternatives.title: Deflect Back
alternatives.hook: One thumb. Swat each incoming orb back the way it came before it cracks your shell — the harder you flick, the farther it flies.
alternatives.why_novel: Parry-and-return verb instead of catch-and-hold; adds an aiming-the-rebound layer, but riskier to read clearly in 5s than a static shield.

alternatives.title: Gravity Flip Dodge
alternatives.hook: Tap to flip gravity and slide your core between two walls of closing spikes — survive the squeeze as the gap shrinks.
alternatives.why_novel: Closest to Daily Dodge's dodge verb with a binary-input twist; rejected as too near a clone of the thing we're trying NOT to clone.

alternatives.title: Rhythm Tap Parry
alternatives.hook: Sparks arrive on the beat — tap left or right exactly as each one lands to parry it in time with the music.
alternatives.why_novel: Adds a rhythm/timing axis to the block verb; rejected for v1 because audio assets aren't allowed in the vanilla pipeline and a silent rhythm game reads poorly.

alternatives.title: Magnet Sort
alternatives.hook: Swing a two-pole magnet around your core and pull each colored shard to its matching pole before it overloads the center.
alternatives.why_novel: Attraction/sorting verb (cleaning-adjacent) rather than block; more cognitive than reflex, so it drifts away from the proven arcade-reflex retention pocket.

alternatives.title: Orbit Sweeper
alternatives.hook: Hold to fling a tethered ball around your base and smash debris out of its orbit before the ring fills up.
alternatives.why_novel: Physics-tether deflect verb; fun but harder to make the goal instantly legible in 5s than a clean rotating shield arc.
